I

IGameEventListener - Interface in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners
Observer interface for game lifecycle events emitted by TurnManager.
initialize() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Initializes the game controller and instantiates the view wrapper.
initialize() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MenuController
Initializes the controller class.
InvalidPlayerCountException - Exception in com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions
Unchecked exception thrown when an invalid number of players is provided during game setup.
InvalidPlayerCountException(int) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayerCountException
Constructs an InvalidPlayerCountException for the given count.
InvalidPlayException - Exception in com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions
Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the principal game rule.
InvalidPlayException(Card, int) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayException
Constructs an InvalidPlayException for the given card and current sum.
IPlayer - Interface in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players
Defines the complete behavioral contract for any participant in a Cincuentazo game, whether human or machine.
isEmpty() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Deck
Returns true if there are no cards left in the deck.
isEmpty() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Returns true if no card has been played yet.
isGameOver() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
isPlayable(int) - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
Returns whether this card can legally be played given the current table sum, i.e.
isPlayable(int) - Method in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
Returns whether a card of this rank can legally be played given the current table sum, i.e.
